title: Repair vehicle body panels using metal finishing
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Repair vehicle body panels using metal finishing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to repair vehicle body panel using metal finishing

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret repair information from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s specifications1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check materials, tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Plan work to identify repair methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret repair information from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s specifications1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check materials, tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Plan work to identify repair methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret repair information from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s specifications1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check materials, tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Plan work to identify repair methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to repair vehicle body panel using metal finishing

elements.title: Carry out metal finishing and heat shrinking activities

pcs.text: Repair components using OEM or authorised agency’s required methods and equipment2.2 Remove dents using hammer and dolly techniques, and file finish panel surface to pre-paint condition2.3 Apply heat shrinking if panel surface is over stretched using an oxyacetylene plant2.4 Use dust and fume collection equipment during repair process according to safety and environmental requirements2.5 Seek and organise assistance where repair of components disturbs vehicle trim or electrical, mechanical or air conditioning systems2.6 Check repairs to ensure work is completed to workplace, OEM or authorised agency specifications and requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Repair components using OEM or authorised agency’s required methods and equipment2.2 Remove dents using hammer and dolly techniques, and file finish panel surface to pre-paint condition2.3 Apply heat shrinking if panel surface is over stretched using an oxyacetylene plant2.4 Use dust and fume collection equipment during repair process according to safety and environmental requirements2.5 Seek and organise assistance where repair of components disturbs vehicle trim or electrical, mechanical or air conditioning systems2.6 Check repairs to ensure work is completed to workplace, OEM or authorised agency specifications and requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Repair components using OEM or authorised agency’s required methods and equipment2.2 Remove dents using hammer and dolly techniques, and file finish panel surface to pre-paint condition2.3 Apply heat shrinking if panel surface is over stretched using an oxyacetylene plant2.4 Use dust and fume collection equipment during repair process according to safety and environmental requirements2.5 Seek and organise assistance where repair of components disturbs vehicle trim or electrical, mechanical or air conditioning systems2.6 Check repairs to ensure work is completed to workplace, OEM or authorised agency specifications and requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out metal finishing and heat shrinking activities

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
